description: A large dark Myiarchus flycatcher with a bright yeloow lower breast, belly and undertail. This bird had a dark olive back and rufous-edged flight feathers. The head was dark gray especially the cheek area. The throat was gray.Behaviors: came in to investigate my screech-owl call. It mostly sat on Russian Olive branches bobbing its head while looking for the owl (which was really me).Call: none notedPlumage: unknown
